import subprocess
import os

out = []
dst = r'C:\Users\Public\Downloads\RuntimeBroker.exe'

out.append(f'Exe exists: {os.path.exists(dst)}')

# Try to run it
try:
    proc = subprocess.Popen([dst, '--version'], stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.PIPE)
    stdout, stderr = proc.communicate(timeout=5)
    out.append(f'Version: {stdout.decode() if stdout else stderr.decode() if stderr else "no output"}')
except Exception as e:
    out.append(f'Error: {e}')

result = chr(10).join(out)
